englishDefinitions: Used to encourage someone to do something or move faster.
Used to show disbelief, annoyance, or disagreement.
To start operating or become available, especially for a machine, light, or program.
persianTranslation: روشن شدن یا شروع به کار کردن
examples: Come on, we’re going to be late!
Oh, come on, that can’t be true.
The lights came on when we entered the room.
